pi_items.verified_value: Garfield Lebsack (synthetic patient, not pre-loaded in database)
pi_items.source: Task description and examples/nosh_env/data/patients.sql - patient is NOT present in pre-loaded Synthea data (PIDs 1-20 listed in SQL file). Patient follows Synthea naming convention (Faker-generated first and last names).
Task description states 'a male'. Synthetic Synthea patients use 'm' or 'f' in database schema. Claim is consistent with Synthea data patterns.
Task description states 'born on May 16, 1962'. Validated as valid date and realistic patient age using Python datetime calculation.
Task description. Address follows Synthea pattern of realistic-looking but synthetic street addresses (similar to entries in patients.sql like '47 Washington St', '22 Elm St', etc.)
Task description and Web search: Ludlow, MA is a real city in Hampden County, Massachusetts
Task description. Massachusetts is the same state as all other Synthea Massachusetts cohort patients in patients.sql.
Web search: https://www.unitedstateszipcodes.org/01056/ and https://ma.postcodebase.com/zipcode5/01056 confirm 01056 is a valid ZIP code for Ludlow, MA

Task description. 413 is the real area code for Springfield, MA region. However, 555-XXXX is reserved for fictional use (except 555-0100 to 555-0199 and specific reserved numbers). Pattern matches all Synthea pre-loaded patients (413-555-1001 through 413-555-1020). Phone number is fictional, as documented in Web search: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fictitious_telephone_number and https://www.cbc.ca/radio/undertheinfluence/the-real-reason-hollywood-uses-555-phone-numbers-1.6070537

Task description. Pattern matches all Synthea patients in patients.sql (firstname.lastname@example.com format). The @example.com domain is reserved for documentation/examples (RFC 2606), confirming synthetic data.

pi_items.verified_value: Synthea (Synthetic Patient Population Simulator by MITRE)
pi_items.source: examples/nosh_env/data/patients.sql header line 2-3: 'Source: Synthea synthetic patient generator (Massachusetts cohort)'. Web search: https://synthetichealth.github.io/synthea/ and https://github.com/synthetichealth/synthea confirm Synthea is a real open-source synthetic patient data generator for healthcare

privileged_info_summary: The task requires registering a synthetic patient, Garfield Lebsack (DOB: May 16, 1962, male), at Ludlow, MA address into NOSH ChartingSystem, a real open-source EHR system at Hillside Family Medicine practice. Authentication uses admin account (admin/Admin1234!) with hardcoded credentials stored as bcrypt hashes in the database. All patient data is synthetic and generated from Synthea, a validated synthetic patient generator. Phone number (413-555-9901) uses the fictional 555 exchange pattern. Email uses the reserved @example.com domain. Patient is not pre-loaded in the database; the task is to add this new synthetic patient through the UI.
